title:

【PENTHOUSE GROOVE “PRISONER OF GROOVE” T-shirt】

The PENTHOUSE GROOVE “PRISONER OF GROOVE” T-shirt, created to commemorate the 2026/05/01 event, was originally released as an event-only item.
Due to the positive response, it is now available online in limited quantities.

Stock is running low, so please check it out if you’re interested.
https://pnthsgroove.base.shop/items/143484100

Also, the highly popular PENTHOUSE GROOVE 45 SO WHAT HOODIE is now sold out, but made-to-order production is still available.
